QF.id: VI Depository and its Business Partners_22

question.text: Physical certificates arising from rematerialisation must be dispatched within what period from receipt of the Rematerialisation Request Form (RRF)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The Issuer/R&T Agent despatches the security certificates within 30 days from receipt of the RRF directly to the client. **The Trap:** '15 days' is the demat processing timeline. Remat takes longer (30 days) because it involves printing physical certificates. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series II-A covers the complete rematerialisation workflow from the RTA's perspective. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The DP forwards the RRF to the issuer/RTA within 7 days. Then the issuer/RTA has 30 days from RRF receipt to dispatch certificates.
